text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume destined to rise above their peers are said to have a
certain aura—a commanding quality that attracts all who stand in their
presence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If anyone has that aura, it must be her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A slender form that slices the air like butter and long legs that cover
ground with remarkable efficiency. Her gaze possesses a determined,
piercing beauty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Above all, she exudes an incomparable air of fortitude and elegance.
It's no wonder how she got her nickname.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since I began watching her, and before I know
it the sky is already dyed a regal purple.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems to be wrapping up her training for the day when
another student approaches her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, sorry I kept you waiting! I can get pretty distracted when
I'm running off of the grounds.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I've come to expect that of you, Suzuka. I figured it was
something like that, so I didn't pay it much mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Do you still have the stamina for our partner run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, no problems there. I'm ready when you are.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that Air Groove and Silence Suzuka I spot? Lookin' like they're
gearin' up for some partner running. This could be interesting!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now that's a pair we may be able to learn a thing or two from.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A crowd quickly forms around the track to watch the duo.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wow! Suzuka's front running is as magnificent as always.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't think Air Groove plans to let her keep that lead, though.
Look—when Suzuka pulls ahead, the fire in Air Groove's eyes just
grows stronger!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And sure enough, just as Silence Suzuka rounds the final turn...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Haahh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Hold up—how the hell did she close that distance so easily?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That acceleration! She did well to conserve that energy and use it at
the most opportune moment. Suzuka can't catch up now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Gasp...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This one's mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An insatiable desire to win, tempered by acute, level-headed
judgment—not to mention her incredible running ability. She is
dazzling in every way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gap between the runners remains open, and Air Groove crosses
the finish ahead of her competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dumbfounded, I find myself watching well after the race, surrounded
by comments from the multiple spectators.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well heck, that was pretty exciting! Now I feel like challenging her
myself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I understand the feeling—her racing is top notch. You could even call
it textbook.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And she's vice president of the student council to boot. I'm glad that
we have someone like her going out of her way to support us.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Her methods of "support" can be a bit harsh, but I guess it's helpful to
us all the same.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Small wonder all of our darling ponies adore her. She's one of the
ideals I strive for.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
By the way... You, over there. I noticed that you've been starin' at Air
Groove practically this whole time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you. I don't see anyone else behind you. Can't say I've seen you
around before. You a new trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you out to scout Air Groove or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Aw, well now... I hate to break it to you, but you're a bit late.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove! There you are! I guess this means you were doing some
personal training today too?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right. Is there a problem?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
No, but I did want to talk to you about tomorrow. Something's come
up for me, so would you be okay with delaying our session by a half
hour?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm. But our course reservation has already been processed, no? In
that case, I'll come out and get started ahead of you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text: Huh? I thought you might enjoy the little break—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
My debut race is just around the corner. I can't afford to waste even a
single minute.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I take breaks as necessary without needing to be told. Have I
ever not been well enough to train, even once?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
W-well, no... I don't think so. All right, then please begin your training
as planned.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, never afraid to lay into her trainer, that one. But yeah, now
you've seen them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She already has a trainer working with her. I'm sorry you had to find
out like this.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I guess she never did run a tryout race, but there's no rule sayin' that you have to do that before getting scouted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This must just mean that I wasn't the only trainer who saw something
truly special in Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I leave the grounds that evening with an acute sense of regret.
